arts.ttl: What APT rule changes mean for Liverpool and Premier League rivals as Man City handed blow
arts.sum: Manchester City launched a legal challenge against the Premier League's APT rules earlier this year, but the proposed changes have been approved by the 20 member clubs

arts.ttl: Arne Slot has positive Trent Alexander-Arnold update for Liverpool fans
arts.sum: The only concern for Slot has been the number of injuries picked up in the early months of the season, although he’s expecting to get a key player back fairly soon. Speaking to reporters on Friday, Slot confirmed that Trent Alexander-Arnold is close to a return: “Trent isn’t training with us yet but he’s getting there so we expect him to be back with us soon .”

arts.ttl: What Arne Slot said to Conor Bradley after Trent Alexander-Arnold blow as Liverpool recovery stepped up
arts.sum: Liverpool were back in training at the AXA Training Centre on Friday ahead of Sunday's trip to Southampton

arts.ttl: Real Madrid take note: Arne Slot provides injury updates on 4 Liverpool players
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has provided an injury update on his squad, just five days out from their upcoming showdown with Real Madrid. Reigning tournament holders Real are primed…

arts.ttl: FSG may have handed Liverpool a brand new transfer budget as Michael Edwards 'promised' January funds
Michael Carrick blown away by Ben Doak as Liverpool winger 'lights everything up'
arts.sum: Michael Carrick and a former Middlesbrough midfielder have been singing the praises of Ben Doak, who is making quite the impression on loan from Liverpool

arts.ttl: Five goalscorers to watch out for this weekend: Marmoush, Gakpo and Kean to maintain fine form
arts.sum: Tom McGarry has picked out five goalscorers to follow across Europe's big leagues this weekend.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi set for Inter Miami reunion with former Liverpool star as his new manager
arts.sum: Javier Mascherano is set to become the new head coach of Inter Miami, with the MLS side turning to the former Barcelona midfielder to lead the club following their recent playoff exit

arts.ttl: 'What I expect' - Conor Bradley now has chance to fulfil Arne Slot prediction at Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Conor Bradley is likely to be given a chance to stake his claim after Trent Alexander-Arnold injury

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes 115 charges pledge as Man City rocked by setback in Liverpool battle
arts.sum: Manchester City are looking to close the gap on Premier League leaders Liverpool on Saturday to two points before the Reds are hosted by rock-bottom Southampton on Sunday afternoon
